titles.en: Chapter on Selling in the Shade
Chapter on Selling in the Shade

segments: : كُنْتُ أَبِيعُ اَلسَّابِرِيَّ فِي اَلظِّلاَلِ فَمَرَّ بِي أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ اَلْأَوَّلُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ رَاكِباً فَقَالَ لِي "يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ اَلْبَيْعَ فِي اَلظِّلاَلِ غِشٌّ وَ اَلْغِشُّ لاَ يَحِلُّ".
arabic.text: : كُنْتُ أَبِيعُ اَلسَّابِرِيَّ فِي اَلظِّلاَلِ فَمَرَّ بِي أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ اَلْأَوَّلُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ رَاكِباً فَقَالَ لِي "يَا هِشَامُ إِنَّ اَلْبَيْعَ فِي اَلظِّلاَلِ غِشٌّ وَ اَلْغِشُّ لاَ يَحِلُّ".

segments:
Hadith. - Hisham ibn Al-Hakam narrated:
"I used to sell Sabiri (a type of cloth) in the shade, and Abu Al-Hasan the First (as) passed by me while riding.
Imam (as) said to me: 'O Hisham, selling in the shade is deceit, and deceit is not permissible.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith. - Hisham ibn Al-Hakam narrated:
"I used to sell Sabiri (a type of cloth) in the shade, and Abu Al-Hasan the First (as) passed by me while riding.
Imam (as) said to me: 'O Hisham, selling in the shade is deceit, and deceit is not permissible.'"

narratorChain.raw: 3980 - رُوِيَ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ اَلْحَكَمِ أَنَّهُ قَالَ
